debug_info.goal:
k : ℕ
⊢ Presheaf.IsSheaf CartSp.openCoverTopology
    { obj := fun n => DSmoothMap (Eucl (Opposite.unop n)) (Eucl (Opposite.unop n) [⋀^Fin k]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ),
      map := fun {n m} f ω => { toFun := fun x => (ω (f.unop x)).compLinearMap ↑(fderiv ℝ (⇑f.unop) x), dsmooth := ⋯ },
      map_id := ⋯, map_comp := ⋯ }

failed_attempts:
rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    refine fun {n} s hs f hf ↦ ?_
    have hs' : ∀ x : Eucl n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
    let k' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
    have hk : ∀ x, ∃ g : k' x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
    let g' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
    have hg' : ∀ x, s (g' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (g' x).1 :=
      fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
    let y' := fun x ↦ (hg' x).2.choose
    let ω := fun x ↦ (f (g' x) (hg' x).1 (y' x)).compLinearMap (fderiv ℝ (g' x).1 (y' x)).toLinearMap.inverse
    refine ⟨⟨⟨ω, sorry⟩, ?_, ?_⟩⟩
    · intro l g hg; ext x; dsimp
      sorry
    · intro ω' hω'; ext x; dsimp
      sorry
